text.t: [Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: D

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: Marked as loot, but it's an item for purchase sold by the Imprisoned Merchant. Reply: Thank you for this distinction.

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: There are two more Celestial Dew for a total of 10. There is a second one in Night's Sacred Ground and there also is one in Erdtree Sanctuary. I've updated Fextralife as well. Reply: Thanks for this, I will add those in.

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: 1

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: There are 2 Lost Ashes missing, there are 14 total. The missing ones are one in Leyndell slums' sewer tunnels (not the one near the Sewer Gaol) and the other missing one is at the bottom of the Sellia Hideaway cave. Reply: I knew I shouldn't have trusted the wiki with these counts. I should have looked how many I had in game. I have 28 from two playthroughs so that checks out. Thanks for the correction! Marked as resolved

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: 1

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: There are 3 Golden Seeds missing, there are 43 total (44 if you count the bugged one in Moghwin Palace). All are found under a Golden Sapling, their locations are 1) West of the Academy courtyard, 2) southwest of the Ravine-Veiled Village and 3) in Mountaintops East in a valley northeast of the Minor Erdtree. Reply: Ah thank you. I felt like some were missing from the wiki. I will add those. Reply: Yeah, I updated the wiki after figuring out which were missing there so Fextralife should be good now. Map Genie helped me figure out which were missing.

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: Does not highlight when checked. Reply: Yeah I realized this a little while ago. You must have an older version copied if its not fixed for you. Thanks for pointing it out though. Marked as resolved Reply: Ah great, thanks! I'll make a new copy for my next playthrough. Re-opened
